debug_info.goal:
Balanced : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)) → Prop
hb₀ : ∀ (s : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2))), Balanced s ↔ ∀ A ∈ s, ∀ B ∈ s, A ≠ B → ∃ C ∈ s, dist A C = dist B C
center_free : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)) → Prop
hb₁ :
  ∀ (s : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2))),
    center_free s ↔
      ∀ A ∈ s, ∀ B ∈ s, ∀ C ∈ s, A ≠ B ∧ B ≠ C ∧ A ≠ C → ¬∃ P ∈ s, dist P A = dist P B ∧ dist P B = dist P C
⊢ (∀ n ≥ 3, ∃ s, Balanced s ∧ s.card = n) ∧
    {n | 3 ≤ n ∧ ∃ s, Balanced s ∧ center_free s ∧ s.card = n} = {n | 3 ≤ n ∧ Odd n}

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
let pairs := s.offDiag.filter (fun p => p.1 < p.2)
        have h_pairs_card : pairs.card = s.card.choose 2 := by sorry
        let f : {p // p ∈ pairs} → s := fun ⟨p, hp⟩ => Classical.choose (hb p.1 (by sorry) p.2 (by sorry) (by sorry))
        have h_f : ∀ A B C, f ⟨(A, B), by sorry⟩ = C → dist C A = dist C B := by sorry
        have h_cf_bound : ∀ C ∈ s, (pairs.filter (fun p => f ⟨p, by sorry⟩ = C)).card ≤ (s.card - 1) / 2 := by
          intro C HC
          let others := (s.erase C)
          have h_others_card : others.card = s.card - 1 := by simp [HC]
          sorry
        sorry
      have h_odd : Odd n := by
        contrapose! h_count
        let m := n / 2
        have hn2m : n = 2 * m := Nat.even_iff_exists_two_mul.mp (Nat.not_odd_iff_even.mp h_count)
        have hm : 1 < m := by linarith
        simp [hn2m, Nat.choose_succ_self]
        rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_comm]
        linarith
      exact ⟨h3, h_odd⟩
    · rintro ⟨h3, h_odd⟩
      obtain ⟨s, hb, hcf, hc⟩ := (by sorry)
      use s, hb, hcf, hc
